creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

A lot of ports don't depend on libogg. Those just simple got linked because 
of libtool's *.la files or/and pkgconfig's *.pc files. For example with first 
of your two ports in your patches, brasero and cheese. There is nothing in 
the source code that is using libogg at all.
